title: vulpia geniculata subsp. attenuata
intro: Vulpia geniculata subsp. attenuata, also known as slender hair grass, is a sub-species of the Vulpia geniculata plant, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Vulpia geniculata subsp. attenuata include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption and application.
